decks.notes: The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly and aggressively overwhelm opponents with a mixture of powerful creatures like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Guide of Souls, supported by removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Galvanic Discharge. The deck also includes utility lands like Plateau and Flagstones of Trokair to support its aggressive game plan. Thalia, Guardian of Thraben provides disruption for opponents, while cards like Goblin Bombardment add additional reach and flexibility to the deck's strategy. Overall, this deck aims to maintain pressure on opponents and close out games efficiently.

The Dragon Stompy deck focuses on disrupting opponents' mana bases through cards like Magus of the Moon and Blood Moon, while also utilizing aggressive creatures like Pyrogoyf and Broadside Bombardiers to quickly close out games. The deck also includes powerful spells like Sundering Eruption and Fury to deal with threats and maintain board control. By combining disruptive elements with aggressive creatures, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm opponents and secure victories through a combination of disruption and damage output.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize Death's Shadow as a powerful aggro threat, supported by a combination of card draw, disruption, and removal spells. The deck aims to quickly lower its own life total with cards like Street Wraith to pump up Death's Shadow, while also using Thoughtseize and Daze to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of Murktide Regent and Reanimate adds additional threats and versatility to the deck, making it a fast and deadly force to be reckoned with in Legacy 1 vs 1 matchups.

This deck aims to quickly cheat out powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Emrakul, the Aeons Torn using cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. By utilizing Atraxa, Grand Unifier to reduce the cost of these big threats, the deck can overwhelm opponents with massive creatures early in the game. With the ability to draw cards, counter spells, and manipulate the deck with cards like Ponder and Brainstorm, the deck is designed to quickly assemble its combo pieces and disrupt opponents before they can effectively react.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with aggressive creatures. It utilizes cards like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Aether Vial to slow down opponents, while also using Stoneforge Mystic and Swords to Plowshares for removal and utility. The deck also has a flicker theme, allowing it to reuse powerful enter-the-battlefield abilities on creatures like Skyclave Apparition and Recruiter of the Guard. Overall, the deck aims to control the board and tempo of the game, gradually wearing down the opponent's resources and defenses.

The main focus of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan with a mix of efficient removal spells and hand disruption while also applying pressure with evasive and efficient creatures. By using cards like Thoughtseize, Wasteland, and Daze to disrupt the opponent's resources, and combining them with aggressive creatures like Nethergoyf and Orcish Bowmasters, the deck aims to control the tempo of the game and secure a win before the opponent can stabilize. Additionally, cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Murktide Regent provide additional card advantage and threat diversity.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push while also controlling the board with removal spells like Drown in the Loch. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and Baleful Strix helps in slowing down aggressive opponents. Orcish Bowmasters and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares are used for their aggressive creatures that can pressure the opponent. The deck also includes counterspells like Force of Will to protect its threats. The key strategy is to maintain a tempo advantage by disrupting the opponent's plays while applying pressure with efficient threats.

The concept of this deck is to quickly and efficiently reanimate powerful creatures from the graveyard using cards like Faithless Looting, Unmask, Animate Dead, Shallow Grave, and Reanimate. These creatures, such as Griselbrand, Atraxa, Grand Unifier, and Archon of Cruelty, can quickly turn the tide of the game in your favor. The deck also includes disruption with cards like Cabal Therapy and Thoughtseize to control the opponent's game plan. With the right setup and timing, this deck can overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and secure a victory.

This Legacy 1 vs 1 Aggro - Death & Taxes deck focuses on disrupting opponent's strategy with cards like Swords to Plowshares and Skyclave Apparition while also applying pressure with creatures like Stoneforge Mystic and Thalia, Guardian of Thraben. The deck utilizes Aether Vial to cheat creatures into play and cards like Recruiter of the Guard to search for key pieces. It also has land destruction elements with cards like Ghost Quarter and Wasteland. The inclusion of Yorion, Sky Nomad as a companion allows for additional value and flexibility in the deck.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with efficient creatures. Misty Rainforest and Polluted Delta provide mana fixing, while Force of Will and Thoughtseize help control the board. Murktide Regent and Orcish Bowmasters serve as the main threats, while Fatal Push and Snuff Out handle opponent's creatures. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and Flow State gives an extra push in tempo. Land destruction with Wasteland and disruption with Daze complement the aggressive playstyle. Overall, the deck aims to dominate the board early and maintain control throughout the game.

This deck focuses on quickly playing and controlling the board with aggressive creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent while disrupting the opponent's game plan with counterspells like Force of Will and Daze. It also utilizes cards like Brainstorm and Mishra's Bauble to dig for key pieces and maintain card advantage. By efficiently managing resources and applying pressure early on, this deck aims to outpace and overwhelm opponents in order to secure a swift victory. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Wasteland and Lightning Bolt provide additional disruption and removal options.

This deck focuses on quickly getting out powerful creatures like Emrakul or Atraxa by utilizing the Show and Tell combo. Using cards like Stock Up and Thoughtseize to control the opponent's hand, as well as counterspells like Force of Will, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with its powerful creatures. With the ability to generate a lot of mana through Ancient Tomb and Omniscience, this deck is designed to consistently bring out game-winning threats early on in the game.

This Eldrazi Aggro deck focuses on quickly ramping out powerful Eldrazi creatures using mana acceleration cards like Lotus Petal and Simian Spirit Guide, as well as lands like Eye of Ugin and Eldrazi Temple. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with large, hard-hitting creatures like Glaring Fleshraker, Reality Smasher, and It That Heralds the End. Additionally, cards like Chalice of the Void and Thought-Knot Seer provide disruption and card advantage. The deck also includes removal in the form of Kozilek's Command and Wastescape Battlemage to clear the way for your creatures to attack.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly generate a large amount of mana using cards like Mox Opal and Lion's Eye Diamond, then use that mana to cast multiple spells in a single turn to create a storm count, allowing for a massive Tendrils of Agony finisher. The deck relies on cards like Dark Ritual and Chrome Mox to generate additional mana for explosive turns, while also utilizing Burning Wish to search for key combo pieces or answers as needed. The inclusion of cards like Silence and Gaea's Will help protect the combo from disruption.

The deck focuses on utilizing disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to control the opponent's plays while efficiently applying pressure with aggressive creatures like Murktide Regent and Orcish Bowmasters. The deck aims to tempo out the opponent by efficiently using disruptive spells and aggressive creatures to win the game quickly before the opponent can stabilize. The combination of disruptive spells, efficient creatures, and card draw/filtering spells like Brainstorm and Ponder allows the deck to maintain momentum and pressure throughout the game.

This deck focuses on locking down the opponent's resources using artifacts like Trinisphere and Karn, the Great Creator. It aims to control the game by using cards like Planar Nexus and Kozilek's Command while ramping up mana quickly with Urza's lands and Grim Monolith. The deck also utilizes powerful artifacts like The One Ring and Candelabra of Tawnos to generate additional value and establish a strong board presence. Emrakul, the Aeons Torn serves as a win condition, while Ugin, Eye of the Storms provides additional control options.
